title: Munchkin Stay Put Baby Suction Bowl Set| Baby Bowls for Weaning| Baby Feeding Suction Dish Pack| for Babies & Toddlers 6 Months+|BPA Free Weaning Set for Babies| Microwave/Dishwasher Safe | 3 Pack
features: BABY FOOD BOWL SET: This cute Munchkin stackable baby bowls set includes 3 bright toddler dishes with a strong suction base on the bottom. The ideal suction bowl for babies weaning from 6+ months
SUCTION BASE STAYS IN PLACE: Each non-slip Munchkin bowl features deep sides for easy scooping, encouraging independent feeding. The ideal toddler bowls or baby food dishes for baby led weaning
SAFE AND NON TOXIC: BPA free baby food bowl. The silicone suction base adheres to most surfaces, so the snack bowl - and meal - stays in place, for (almost) mess-free dinners, at home or away
EASY TO USE AND CLEAN: Quick-release tab on our suction plates and bowls' bases for simple removal. Strong, durable plastic dishes are top-shelf dishwasher safe for easy cleaning. For 6+ months
DISCOVER THE MUNCHKIN BABY FEEDING SETS: Complete your toddler's dinnerware collection with our baby suction plates and sippy cups, plus Munchkin infant feeding accessories and baby weaning sets
description: From the manufacturer Less Mess, More Fun! Designed with busy parents and independent eaters in mind, stay put suction bowls stay put! With deep sides for easy scooping and tall sides to hold meals, fruit or puddings, these bowls are perfect for self-feeding and baby-led weaning. Plus, they're microwave and top-rack dishwasher safe for easy food prep and clean-up. Munchkin Stay Put 3x Baby Feeding Bowls with a strong suction base for easy and mess-free feeding Stackable design for easy and compact storage. The Munchkin Stay Put Baby Suction Bowl Set is ideal for babies weaning from 6+ months and older children. Colourful and matching suction bowls with deep and high sides for hassle-free scooping Strong suction base sticks to most flat surfaces, particularly plastic, glass and laminate. Not suitable for use on porous surfaces. TIP: Wipe the tray/sucker with an alcohol-based solution if the bowls don't stick Discover more of Munchkin's products! It's the little things: At Munchkin, we’re pouring our hearts into simplifying life, with big ideas for little hands. Discover our baby products and toddler accessories, from weaning essentials and sippy cups to baby bath toys and highchairs, all designed with children in mind.
